events.label: OpenAI saved-reset launch credit
events.basis: public banked-reset launch timestamp + expiry window
events.note: OpenAI announced that Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users start with one free saved reset.

events.label: Tibo reset banking policy note
events.basis: policy signal, not a reset credit
events.note: This post describes future reset banking behavior; it is useful provenance but should not be counted as a reset credit.

events.label: Tibo June 16 incoming reset
events.basis: announcement timestamp + possible 24 hour rollout + expiry window
events.note: Tibo said to give the team 24 hours to reset Codex rate limits across all plans. Public reports indicate this may have applied immediately rather than adding a banked credit.

events.label: Tibo sneaky double reset bank credit
events.note: Tibo said users got a full reset plus one reset into the reset bank.

events.label: Tibo June 26 reset on the house
events.basis: announcement timestamp + possible few-hour rollout + expiry window
events.note: Tibo said the reset should show in accounts in the next few hours. Use Codex UI expiry if it becomes available.

events.label: Tibo June 4 paid-plan usage reset
events.note: Historical immediate usage reset across paid plans; not expected to remain as a banked credit.

events.label: Tibo March 3 rate-limit reset
events.note: Historical immediate rate-limit reset; useful for reset history, not current bank prediction.
